title: monardella odoratissima var. glauca
intro: Monardella odoratissima var. glauca, also known as Purple Mountain Monardella, is a fragrant, shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant contains volatile oils with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used in traditional herbal medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Monardella odoratissima var. glauca include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting respiratory health and relieving cold and flu symptoms. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
